title: phormium tenax f. atropurpureum
intro: Phormium tenax f. atropurpureum, also known as the New Zealand flax or Red Flax, is a variety of the Phormium tenax plant, a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phormium tenax f. atropurpureum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, ointments, or infusions, and it can also be used in tinctures or capsules for its medicinal properties.
